---
# title: "aksh.ai"
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  fields: [date, title, image, reading-time, description, categories]
  feed: 
    items: 20
    type: full
    categories: [english, telugu, ai, travel]
  date-format: "DD MMM YYYY"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
